title: Votes will be counted by hand in Latvia's parliamentary election this year
summary_full: On Thursday, March 26th, the Saeima adopted an amendment to the Saeima Election Law, which means that all vote counting in the 15th Saeima elections, due to take place in the Autumn, will be by hand.
summary_public: On Thursday, March 26th, the Saeima adopted an amendment to the Saeima Election Law, which means that all vote counting in the 15th Saeima elections, due to take place in the Autumn, will be by hand.
